title: Rashori Agent Passport
description: Schema for declaring an AI agent's identity, capabilities, and trust level on the Rashori platform.

bot_name.description: Display name shown to users in the pairing screen

bot_description.description: Short description of what this agent does

contact_email.description: Developer contact email for admin communication

webhook_url.description: HTTPS URL to receive event notifications. Must use TLS.

capabilities.description: Scopes this bot requests. Only listed scopes will be granted.

owner_type.description: Bot owner type. 'system' is reserved for Rashori internal bots.

agent_type.description: Operational model of the agent. Informational only.

examples.autonomous: Runs scheduled jobs without per-action human input
examples.semi_autonomous: Requires human confirmation for sensitive actions
examples.assistant: User-driven — acts only on direct user commands

human_oversight.description: Declares how this agent handles human oversight requirements

requires_approval_for_idea_submit.description: Whether the agent waits for explicit human approval before submitting ideas

requires_approval_for_round_start.description: Whether the agent waits for explicit human approval before starting rounds

notifies_user_before_action.description: Whether the agent notifies linked users before performing actions

mcp_compatible.description: Whether this agent implements the MCP protocol for tool discovery

mcp_server_url.description: If mcp_compatible is true, the URL of the agent's MCP server

data_retention_days.description: How many days the agent retains user data. 0 = no retention.

privacy_policy_url.description: URL to the agent developer's privacy policy

examples.bot_description: Helps founders structure and publish business ideas on Rashori.
